meta.rate_limit_note: Finnhub 免费 key = 60 calls/min；当前持仓标的数量决定调用次数

articles.headline: Bitcoin, Ethereum, XRP, Dogecoin Hold Steady Amid US-Iran Truce Momentum: Here's Why This Analyst Thinks Now Is A 'Great Time To Buy' BTC
articles.summary: Leading cryptocurrencies were range-bound on Wednesday, while stocks closed higher as investors weighed de-escalation prospects in the Middle East war.
